top.name: Ragnarok
top.rules_text: Deal 7 damage to ALL units per unique element imbued on board (max 28). Purge all tiles.

bottom.name: Elemental Convergence
bottom.rules_text: Imbue all tiles within range 3 with random elements. Set all elemental attunement counters to 3.

upgrades.description: Ragnarok's base damage per element increases. Elemental Convergence covers a wider area.

changes.value: Deal 8 damage to ALL units per unique element imbued on board (max 32). Purge all tiles.
Imbue all tiles within range 4 with random elements. Set all attunement counters to 3.

upgrades.description: Apocalypse: Ragnarok counts attunement counters as bonus elements. More attunement means more damage even with fewer board tiles.

changes.value: Deal 8 damage per unique element on board. Your attunement charges each count as half an element. Purge all.

upgrades.description: Controlled Burn: After Ragnarok purges tiles, re-imbue 4 random tiles with your highest attunement element. The fire never fully dies.

changes.value: Deal 8 damage per element (max 32). Allies take half. Purge all tiles, then re-imbue 4 with your highest element.

upgrades.description: Total War: Ragnarok's ally damage reduction becomes permanent — your units always take half damage from Ragnarok.

changes.value: Deal 9 damage per element (max 36). Allies always take half. Purge all tiles.
Imbue all tiles within range 5 with random elements. Set all attunement counters to 4.

upgrades.description: Phoenix Protocol: After Ragnarok resolves, draw 1 card per unique element that had 2+ tiles before purging.

changes.value: Deal 8 damage per element. Allies take half. Purge all. Draw 1 per element with 2+ tiles. Re-imbue 4 tiles.
Imbue tiles within range 5. Set all attunement to 4.

upgrades.description: The End: Ragnarok costs 4 mana instead of 5. The spell has transcended its own limitations.

changes.value: Cost reduced to 4. Deal 9 damage per element (max 36). Allies take half. Purge all tiles.

upgrades.description: Eternal Flame: Ragnarok no longer purges fire tiles. The conflagration persists even after the apocalypse.

changes.value: Deal 9 damage per element. Allies take half. Purge all non-fire tiles. Draw 1 per 2 elements. Gain 2 mana.
